mapper.sql: order_item, order_item_split, id, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, mergeflag, modelNo, quantity, stdPrice, transType, purchaseDate, hopeDeliveryDate, supplierId, stateCode, ordType, specMark, receiveWarehouseId, remark, hopeExportDate, inqNo, shikomiAnswerNo, operatorId, deptNo, apply_dept_no, smcCode, invoiceNo, hsCode, greenCode, productType, customerNo, userNo, salesInfoNo, purchaseType, supplierPartNo, importFobPriceOriginal, importCurrencyId, serverremark, updateTime, corderNO, inventoryPropertyId, replyOrderNo, dlvModDate, qtyReceive, finishDate, operator, information, filepath, sendVersion, deleteReason, vipCode, src_delivery_time, dlvmoddate_str, supplier_assign_type, end_user, prepareOrderNo
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.purchaseOrder_view
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.purchaseOrder_view (order_item, order_item_split, id, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, mergeflag, modelNo, quantity, stdPrice, transType, purchaseDate, hopeDeliveryDate, supplierId, stateCode, ordType, specMark, receiveWarehouseId, remark, hopeExportDate, inqNo, shikomiAnswerNo, operatorId, deptNo, apply_dept_no, smcCode, invoiceNo, hsCode, greenCode, productType, finishDate, operator, information, filepath, sendVersion, deleteReason, vipCode, src_delivery_time, dlvmoddate_str, supplier_assign_type, end_user, prepareOrderNo) values (#{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItemSplit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, mapper.update:
update dbo.purchaseOrder_view
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item_split = #{record.orderItemSplit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
orderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
splitItemNo = #{record.splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mergeflag = #{record.mergeflag,jdbcType=BIT},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stdPrice = #{record.stdprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
transType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
purchaseDate = #{record.purchasedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
hopeDeliveryDate = #{record.hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=DATE},
supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=CHAR},
ordType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
specMark = #{record.specmark,jdbcType=CHAR},
receiveWarehouseId = #{record.receivewarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
hopeExportDate = #{record.hopeexportdate,jdbcType=DATE},
inqNo = #{record.inqno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shikomiAnswerNo = #{record.shikomianswerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operatorId = #{record.operatorid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
apply_dept_no = #{record.applyDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
smcCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=NCHAR},
hsCode = #{record.hscode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
greenCode = #{record.greencode,jdbcType=CHAR},
productType = #{record.producttype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salesInfoNo = #{record.salesinfono,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
purchaseType = #{record.purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR},
supplierPartNo = #{record.supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
importFobPriceOriginal = #{record.importfobpriceoriginal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
importCurrencyId = #{record.importcurrencyid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
serverremark = #{record.serverremark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
corderNO = #{record.corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventoryPropertyId = #{record.inventorypropertyid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
replyOrderNo = #{record.replyorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlvModDate = #{record.dlvmoddate,jdbcType=DATE},
qtyReceive = #{record.qtyreceive,jdbcType=INTEGER},
finishDate = #{record.finishdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
operator = #{record.operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
information = #{record.information,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
filepath = #{record.filepath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sendVersion = #{record.sendversion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deleteReason = #{record.deletereason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
vipCode = #{record.vipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
src_delivery_time = #{record.srcDeliveryTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlvmoddate_str = #{record.dlvmoddateStr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_assign_type = #{record.supplierAssignType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prepareOrderNo = #{record.prepareorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
